title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER JACKSON COUNTY GET READY ROGUE SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Email (541) 774-6790 Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER JOSEPHINE COUNTY JOSEPHINE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. (541) 474-5221 Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER JOSEPHINE COUNTY MINT WARMING CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering an overnight shelter during times of extreme cold weather when temperatures reach 32 degrees ir below with wind, rain and snow or 30 degrees or below when clear. Meals will be provided. Cots and blankets are available on a first-come, first-serve basis. 218 Redwood Highway Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Adults ages 18 and older. Pets allowed. Hours: Open 7 days per week 5pm-8am when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below with wind, rain and snow or 30 degrees or below when clear Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details The following 2 providers match your search parameters but are outside of your search radius. SEVERE WEATHER JACKSON COUNTY ASHLAND EMERGENCY WINTER SHELTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight winter shelter throughout the winter season and when temperatures drop to 32 degrees or below. Limited space available and is first-come first-served. Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older. Leashed pets allowed. Hours: Open 24 hours a day when temperatures drop 32 degrees or below (541) 499-0880 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER JACKSON COUNTY OHRA EMERGENCY SHELTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an overnight winter shelter with limited availability of 25 beds. 2350 Ashland Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Open 24 hours a day when temperatures drop 32 degrees or below (541) 631-2235 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER JOSEPHINE COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER JACKSON COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
